name: Loan Amortization Calculator
seo_description: Free loan amortization calculator: calculate payment, total_interest from your main, rate, years. Instant results, not sign-up required.
result_context: The payment of {payment} is your monthly mortgage payment. the total_interest of {total_interest} is paid over the loan life.
mistakes: Not accounting for property taxes and insurance in total payment
Paying only minimum without considering extra main payments
Refinancing without calculating break-even point on closing costs
desc: Free online loan amortization calculator. Enter main and annual rate % to get instant results.
